scripts.test:int:api: DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5433 DB_USER=app DB_PASSWORD=app DB_NAME=cv_test npm run test:int -w @cv/api -- --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles
scripts.test:e2e:api: DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5433 DB_USER=app DB_PASSWORD=app DB_NAME=cv_test npm run test:e2e -w @cv/api -- --watchman=false --detectOpenHandles
scripts.migration:run:test:api: DB_HOST=localhost DB_PORT=5433 DB_USER=app DB_PASSWORD=app DB_NAME=cv_test npm run migration:run -w @cv/api
scripts.ci:quality:local: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run test:cov:api
scripts.precommit:checks: npm run test:secrets:gitleaks && npm run ci:quality:local && npm run ci:integration:local && npm run test:web:precommit
